title: Savage Hunger Enchantment
description: Do you need more damage? but also like to be the opposite of a husk?
body:
# 📢Announcement
All future updates to this datapack will be available only on [Way too many Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_way-too-many-enchantments!), this will also mean this project will be permenantly archived until further notice.

# Description
Do you need more damage? but also like to be the opposite of a husk?

Well, with the Savage Hunger Enchantment, it adds, well an enchantment called "Savage Hunger". this brand new enchantment allows players to gain a permenant Hunger effect, base 1 per level 3, and you will gain +2 attack damage per level!


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
- [Way too many Enchantments!](https://modrinth.com/collection/90b6VDPP)
